metadata.description: Specify the name of cognitive service account deployment.
Required. The name of Cognitive Services account deployment model.
Required. The format of Cognitive Services account deployment model.
Required. The version of Cognitive Services account deployment model.
Required. Properties of Cognitive Services account deployment model.
Required. The name of the resource model definition representing SKU.
The capacity of the resource model definition representing SKU.
The resource model definition representing SKU.
Name of the environment that can be used as part of naming resource convention
Name of the resource group to use or create
Primary location for all resources
Name of the AI Foundry project
List of model deployments
Creates a Log Analytics workspace.
Creates an Application Insights instance based on an existing Log Analytics workspace.
Specify the name of cognitive service account deployment.
Required. The name of Cognitive Services account deployment model.
Required. The format of Cognitive Services account deployment model.
Required. The version of Cognitive Services account deployment model.
Required. Properties of Cognitive Services account deployment model.
Required. The name of the resource model definition representing SKU.
The capacity of the resource model definition representing SKU.
The resource model definition representing SKU.
Tags that will be applied to all resources
Location for the AI Services account
List of model deployments to create on the account
Tags that will be applied to all resources
Location for the project
Name of the AI Foundry project
Name of the parent AI Services account
Resource ID of the Application Insights instance. Pass empty string to skip.
Connection string for Application Insights. Pass empty string to skip.
Name of the connection
Category of the connection (e.g., ContainerRegistry, AzureStorageAccount, CognitiveSearch, AzureOpenAI)
Target endpoint or URL for the connection
Authentication type
Whether the connection is shared to all users (optional, defaults to true)
Additional metadata for the connection (optional)
Error message if the connection fails (optional)
Expiry time for the connection (optional)
Private endpoint requirement: Required, NotRequired, or NotApplicable (optional)
Private endpoint status: Active, Inactive, or NotApplicable (optional)
List of users to share the connection with (optional, alternative to isSharedToAll)
Whether to use workspace managed identity (optional)
OAuth2 authorization endpoint URL (optional, OAuth2 authType only)
OAuth2 token endpoint URL (optional, OAuth2 authType only)
OAuth2 refresh token endpoint URL (optional, OAuth2 authType only)
OAuth2 scopes to request (optional, OAuth2 authType only)
Token audience for UserEntraToken / AgenticIdentity auth types (optional)
Managed connector name for OAuth2 managed connectors (optional)
AI Services account name
AI project name
Connection configuration

Credentials for the connection. Kept as a separate @secure parameter to prevent secrets from appearing in deployment logs. Shape depends on authType — e.g. { key: "..." } for ApiKey, { clientId: "...", clientSecret: "..." } for OAuth2/ServicePrincipal.

connection.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('aiServicesAccountName'), parameters('aiProjectName'), parameters('connectionConfig').name)]
connection.properties: [shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('category', parameters('connectionConfig').category, 'target', parameters('connectionConfig').target, 'authType', parameters('connectionConfig').authType, 'isSharedToAll', coalesce(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'isSharedToAll'), true()), 'credentials', if(not(empty(parameters('credentials'))), parameters('credentials'), null()), 'metadata', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'metadata')), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'error'), null())), createObject('error', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'error')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'expiryTime'), null())), createObject('expiryTime', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'expiryTime')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'peRequirement'), null())), createObject('peRequirement', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'peRequirement')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'peStatus'), null())), createObject('peStatus', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'peStatus')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'sharedUserList'), null())), createObject('sharedUserList', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'sharedUserList')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'useWorkspaceManagedIdentity'), null())), createObject('useWorkspaceManagedIdentity', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'useWorkspaceManagedIdentity')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'authorizationUrl'), null())), createObject('authorizationUrl', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'authorizationUrl')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'tokenUrl'), null())), createObject('tokenUrl', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'tokenUrl')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'refreshUrl'), null())), createObject('refreshUrl', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'refreshUrl')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'scopes'), null())), createObject('scopes', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'scopes')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'audience'), null())), createObject('audience', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'audience')), createObject()), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'connectorName'), null())), createObject('connectorName', tryGet(parameters('connectionConfig'), 'connectorName')), createObject())))]
